5.0.1+0b2323d25208ad4b09cd8c4f59955a93d71a847e

Cli tool to help with Docker/Kuberbetes Local Containers Development for Microsoft Azure MSI Identity authentication.

Usage: appauthentication [command] [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  --version  Show version information.
  -?         Show help information.

Commands:
  run        Runs instance of the local server that returns authentication
             tokens.

Run 'appauthentication [command] -?' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Runs instance of the local server that returns authentication tokens.

Usage: appauthentication run [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  --help                    Show help information.
  -a|--authority            Authority Azure TenantId or Azure Directory ID
  -r|--resource             Resource to authenticate against. Provided
                            https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenantId}.
                            Default set to https://vault.azure.net/
  -v|--verbose[:<VERBOSE>]  Allows Verbose logging for the tool. Enable this to
                            get tracing information. Default is false.
                            Allowed values are: Trace, Debug, Information,
                            Warning, Error, Critical, None.
  -e|--environment          Specify Hosting Environment Name for the cli tool
                            execution. The Default is Development
  -p|--port                 Specify Web Host port number otherwise it is
                            automatically generated. The Default port if open is
                            5050.
  -c|--config               Allows to specify a configuration file besides
                            appsettings.json to be specified. The Default
                            appsetting.json located in the execution path.
  -t|--token-provider       The Azure CLI Access Token Provider to retrieve the
                            Authentication Token. The Default provider is
                            AzureCli.
                            Allowed values are: VisualStudio, AzureCli.
                            Default value is: AzureCli.
  -f|--fix                  Fix command resets Environment Variables.
  -l|--local                Setup MSI_ENDPOINT to be pointing to localhost. The
                            Default is set to support Docker Containers only.

commands.payload:
Runs instance of the local server that returns authentication tokens.

Usage: appauthentication run [options] [[--] <arg>...]

Options:
  --help                    Show help information.
  -a|--authority            Authority Azure TenantId or Azure Directory ID
  -r|--resource             Resource to authenticate against. Provided
                            https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenantId}.
                            Default set to https://vault.azure.net/
  -v|--verbose[:<VERBOSE>]  Allows Verbose logging for the tool. Enable this to
                            get tracing information. Default is false.
                            Allowed values are: Trace, Debug, Information,
                            Warning, Error, Critical, None.
  -e|--environment          Specify Hosting Environment Name for the cli tool
                            execution. The Default is Development
  -p|--port                 Specify Web Host port number otherwise it is
                            automatically generated. The Default port if open is
                            5050.
  -c|--config               Allows to specify a configuration file besides
                            appsettings.json to be specified. The Default
                            appsetting.json located in the execution path.
  -t|--token-provider       The Azure CLI Access Token Provider to retrieve the
                            Authentication Token. The Default provider is
                            AzureCli.
                            Allowed values are: VisualStudio, AzureCli.
                            Default value is: AzureCli.
  -f|--fix                  Fix command resets Environment Variables.
  -l|--local                Setup MSI_ENDPOINT to be pointing to localhost. The
                            Default is set to support Docker Containers only.
